summary: Dead code audit for v0.10: profiles survive in update/export, DefaultTierMapping never called, rules/ and leo-export/ stale, MemoryConfig fields unread, multiple dead scaffolding functions.

content.what: Comprehensive dead code audit results for v0.10 cleanup

high_priority: update.go: entire command — profile sync contradicts upgrade.go which deletes profiles; sync dependency eliminated by MCP
DefaultTierMapping() + HookDef + SupportsHooks + RegisterHooks: interface methods never called in production (runtime.go, claude.go, codex.go)
rules/ directory: 16 Markdown profile files from pre-YAML era
leo-export/ directory: stale export artifact with old layout + profiles
medium_priority: legacySpecialists struct (config.go:151-156): parsed but never read
discoverUninitializedChildRepos (onboarding.go:327-349): redundant with v0.9 scope walks in init and bootstrap
schema.json session-log: requires profile field, allows pipeline_tier — both retired
low_priority: core_kb.go: 'specialist' in escalation-triggers and propagation constraints
SessionEvent.Tier (events.go:10): hardcoded to 'execution', carries no info
languageLabel (onboarding.go:489-498): pt/es branches dead since v0.9
kept: ReadAllScopes / InheritedDoc (multiscope.go): fully implemented multi-scope read — needed for v0.11 MCP multi-scope recall
